messages.say:
Turn these into one detailed, comprehensive PER-FILE implementation changes plan:


Improvement plan


The direction is correct. The refactor should make Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh and the ICT files consume one canonical market truth, then emit strategy hypotheses. They should not assemble canonical DOM/OFI/OBI/CVD state themselves. In MT5, timer cadence and DOM subscriptions are safer when centrally owned: OnTimer is the EA timer entrypoint, MarketBookAdd() is normally opened from OnInit(), and OnBookEvent() broadcasts within the chart, which is exactly why scanner/book orchestration should stay centralized rather than strategy-local. (MQL5)


For FX and XAUUSD, this is not just code hygiene; it is market-structure hygiene. FX is OTC, decentralized, fragmented, and heavily internalised, so direct institutional observability is uneven. LBMA describes London gold as an OTC bilateral market and its trade reporting as an aggregation/transparency layer, not a single public consolidated book. That is why the strategy layer must consume degrade-aware canonical state, not reinvent “institutional” truth per strategy. (Bank for International Settlements)


1. Target end-state


Use this chain as the implementation target:


CA_Trading_System_EA.mq5
-> Signals/Snapshots/Scanners
-> MarketScannerHub.mqh
-> AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh
-> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
-> CategorySelector.mqh
-> Strategy(staged strategy gate: Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh, Strat_ICT*.mqh)
-> StrategyHypothesis/StrategyContext
-> StrategyRegistry.mqh / StrategyBase.mqh / StrategyCommon.mqh
-> Router.mqh
-> Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh
-> Execution.mqh
-> PositionMgmt.mqh / State.mqh / Config.mqh


The internal formulation should be:


raw market state -> selected category state -> strategy hypotheses -> final integrated trade state


That gives you one canonical state, one anti-echo category selector, one staged strategy layer, and one router/risk/execution chain.


2. Ownership model to enforce


MarketScannerHub.mqh


Own cadence only.
Drive scanner updates on timer, not inside strategies.
Own symbol/timeframe sweep orchestration and event draining.


AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh


Own scanner/event fusion only.
Produce location and pattern/event context from:


Autochartist-like patterns

FVG scans

liquidity sweeps

structure snapshots

session state

pattern/candlestick observations


Do not own final institutional microstructure truth.


InstitutionalStateVector.mqh


Own canonical raw market state only.
This is where:


RawSignalBank_t

institutional availability

institutional degrade state

base context

structure context

coverage context
are assembled.


CategorySelector.mqh


Own:


one-per-category anti-echo selection

Institutional degrade-aware selection

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

SignalStackGate_t

LocationPass_t


Strategy files


Own interpretation only.
Consume canonical state and emit:


StrategyHypothesis_t

StrategyContext_t

local alpha/risk/entry model fields

veto reasons

POI / entry anchor

stop/TP model

execution posture hints


StrategyRegistry / Router / Policies / Risk / Execution


Registry compares hypotheses.
Router chooses admissible winner.
Policies/Risk veto or resize.
Execution only sends and manages orders.


That split is the clean line. No exceptions.


3. Main Trading Strategy Logic refactor plan


Your current main logic is a retail-style checklist written as a direct order trigger. It needs to become a staged hypothesis generator.


What changes conceptually


Replace this:


“if buy/sell selector or phase or OF/volume then walk a checklist then auto-enter”


With this:


build directional bias

validate regime

validate location

validate liquidity event

validate institutional participation

validate volume participation

validate trigger confirmation

emit strategy hypothesis

let router/risk/execution decide final send


New staged gate design for Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Stage 0: Direction seed


Inputs:


Buy/Sell input selector

HTF accumulation/distribution state from ICTWyckoffModel.mqh, WyckoffCycle.mqh

selected Institutional category direction

selected Trend category direction


Output:


dir_t

bias_reason_mask


This stage should not arm a trade. It only sets candidate direction.


Stage 1: Regime gate


Consume:


H4 and D1 market structure

intraday phase

HTF EMA/VWAP/TWAP alignment

ADX/trend regime

volatility regime


Output:


regime_pass

setup_class such as continuation, reversal, accumulation-breakout, distribution-breakdown, mean-reclaim


This is where your current “4H and Daily market structures” requirement belongs.


Stage 2: Location gate


Consume always-on structure state:


PivotDist_t

SRDist_t

FibDist_t

SDScore_t

OBScore_t

FVGScore_t

SweepScore_t

WyckoffScore_t

TrendSlope_t


Build a POI object:


poi_type

poi_lo

poi_hi

poi_anchor_tf

poi_quality


This stage replaces:


Identify 4H and Daily structure, pivots, support/resistance

Identify institutional demand/supply near those zones

Identify order block near demand/supply
and part of the final “around OB zone / pivot” entry wording.


Location should be a hard gate, not just a score input.


Stage 3: Liquidity event gate


Consume:


liquidity pool maps

inducement / sweep / grab events from LiquidityCues.mqh

displacement/reclaim

FVG open or mitigation state

spread/slippage/depth stress


Output:


liquidity_event_pass

event_type such as sweep-reclaim, inducement-break, displacement-retest, spring, UTAD, session-manipulation


This stage replaces:
4. Identify liquidity pools / inducement
and part of your entry timing.


Stage 4: Institutional participation gate


Consume only canonical state from InstitutionalStateVector.mqh and CategorySelector.mqh:


InstSel_t

InstSelSource_t

InstCoverage_t

direct or proxy institutional signal

OFI_t, CVD_t, OBI_t, FlowImb, Resil_t, VPIN_t, DepthFade_t, SpreadShock_t as read-only veto inputs


Rules:


if direct institutional state is available, require direct alignment

if only proxy institutional state is available, allow weaker pass threshold

if whole Institutional category is unavailable, follow configured degrade mode

never recalc OFI/CVD/OBI inside the strategy


This stage replaces:
3. Check increase of buy/sell order from order flow or delta
and the “Order Book Balance/Flow increasing buy/sell order” condition in the old header.


Stage 5: Volume participation gate


Consume:


selected Volume category signal

VSA state

footprint delta / stacked imbalance

profile acceptance/rejection

VAState_t, POCDist_t


Rules:


validate that price movement is backed by participation

zone retests without volume support should not arm


This stage replaces:
6. Look for increase in buy/sell order VSA around zone/pivot


Stage 6: Trigger confirmation gate


Consume:


candlestick patterns from Patterns.mqh

chart patterns from Patterns.mqh / Autochartist / scanner events

fallback trend confirmation: price vs session VWAP and HTF EMA21/EMA50 alignment


This stage replaces:
7. Bullish/Bearish candlestick pattern
8. Bullish/Bearish chart pattern
or the VWAP + EMA clause


Important:
These should be trigger enhancers, not primary location builders.


Stage 7: Execution gate


Consume:


spread shock

slippage

depth fade

resiliency

session window

news filter

RR feasibility vs stop model / target model


Output:


exec_style_t

entry_model_t

stop_model_t

tp_model_t

rr_min_t

exec_pass


This stage prevents a good setup in a bad tape.


Stage 8: Hypothesis emission


Emit StrategyHypothesis_t instead of trade order.


Minimum fields:


strategy_id

armed_t

dir_t

setup_class

poi_type

poi_lo

poi_hi

location_pass_t

stack_required_votes_t

stack_actual_votes_t

inst_source_t

degrade_acceptance_t

entry_model_t

exec_style_t

stop_model_t

tp_model_t

rr_min_t

alpha_local_t

risk_local_t

veto_mask

invalidation_reason


That is the main refactor.


4. How the current Main strategy checklist maps into the new architecture


Buy side mapping


Current logic:


buy selector or accumulation or buy OF/volume

structure -> zone -> OF -> liquidity -> OB -> VSA -> patterns -> enter


New form:


dir_t = BUY

regime_pass = accumulation or bullish continuation or bullish reclaim

location_pass = demand/support/pivot/OB/FVG/fib cluster

liquidity_event_pass = sell-side sweep or inducement clear or reclaim

inst_pass = direct bullish OFI/CVD/OBI/flow or approved proxy

vol_pass = VSA/footprint/profile support

trigger_pass = candlestick OR chart pattern OR VWAP+EMA alignment

emit BUY hypothesis


Sell side mapping


Same structure, inverted:


distribution/bearish continuation/rejection

supply/resistance/pivot/OB/FVG cluster

buy-side sweep or failure

bearish institutional participation

bearish VSA/footprint/profile

bearish trigger

emit SELL hypothesis


5. File-by-file improvement plan


Types.mqh


Add or finalize:


RawSignalBank_t

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

BaseContextVector_t

StructureVector_t

CoverageContextVector_t

AuxContextVector_t

FinalIntegratedStateVector_t

StrategyHypothesis_t

StrategyContext_t

StrategyHypothesisBank_t

StrategyGateTrace_t

POI_t

ExecutionPosture_t

ENUM_SETUP_CLASS

ENUM_POI_TYPE

ENUM_ENTRY_MODEL

ENUM_STOP_MODEL

ENUM_TP_MODEL

ENUM_INST_SOURCE

ENUM_DEGRADE_MODE


Goal:
transport contracts live here once, not redefined downstream.


Config.mqh


Add knobs for:


category selection mode

Institutional degrade mode

minimum category votes

minimum location votes

direct vs proxy institutional thresholds

strategy arming thresholds

strategy-specific regime masks

strategy-specific required location masks

enable/disable Autochartist influence

tester degrade scenarios

warmup readiness thresholds


Goal:
no hard-coded stage thresholds inside strategy files.


MarketScannerHub.mqh


Keep as orchestration wrapper.
Upgrade to ensure:


timer-driven scan cadence

symbol universe preseed

scanner freshness flags

event queue for Confluence

optional runtime symbol pool warm-start


This matches MT5 timer ownership and keeps scan cadence centralized. (MQL5)


AutochartistEngine.mqh


Restrict role to:


pattern and level events

chart/candlestick context

no trade bypass

no raw institutional truth


Emit only structured events:


pattern_type

level_type

direction_hint

completion/emerging state

distance-to-level


Confluence.mqh


Make it the event fusion layer, not the institutional calculator.
Responsibilities:


fuse scanner outputs

dedupe pattern/event echoes

expose location/event context for InstitutionalStateVector and strategies

push POI-adjacent context, not direct trade orders


InstitutionalStateVector.mqh


This is the backbone.
Responsibilities:


compute full RawSignalBank_t

compute Institutional availability / coverage

compute degrade state

compute proxy institutional bank

build base/structure/coverage vectors

expose canonical read-only state for CategorySelector and strategies


Do not let strategies duplicate any of:


OFI

CVD

OBI

DOM skew/pressure

impact

toxicity

resiliency

degrade logic


CategorySelector.mqh


Responsibilities:


one-per-category anti-echo selection

Institutional subfamily anti-echo

direct vs proxy Institutional selection

category pass logic

SignalStackGate_t

LocationPass_t

effective minimum vote relaxation under degrade mode


This is where the “pick one from each category” rule should live.


Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Refactor from imperative checklist to staged hypothesis builder.
Key rule:
consume:


BaseContextVector_t

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

StructureVector_t

CoverageContextVector_t

selected read-only raw diagnostics if necessary


Do not call raw providers to reconstruct canonical truth.


Strat_ICT_OBFVG_OTE.mqh


Upgrade plan:


use HTF dealing range and premium/discount from canonical structure context

require OB + FVG adjacency and OTE retracement

require location near pivot/SR/SD/OB cluster

require liquidity event before entry

require direct or proxy institutional support

add execution-quality vetoes

emit hypothesis, not order


Setup emphasis:
continuation/reversal entry into OB/FVG/OTE cluster with microstructure confirmation.


Strat_ICT_PO3.mqh


Upgrade plan:


use ICTSessionModel.mqh for session segmentation

identify accumulation range, manipulation sweep, distribution leg

require sweep/displacement logic from LiquidityCues and structure context

use category-selected Trend/Momentum/Volume confirmation

use Institutional direct/proxy support to validate manipulation/distribution quality

emit PO3 hypothesis with session-specific urgency


Setup emphasis:
session narrative + sweep + distribution execution.


Strat_ICT_SilverBullet.mqh


Upgrade plan:


enforce strict time windows

require liquidity grab into FVG/OB or structure level

require immediate displacement confirmation

require volume/participation confirmation

execution gate must be tighter because this is time-compressed

handle institutional degrade explicitly; do not overtrade blind windows


Setup emphasis:
time-window precision + displacement/retrace execution.


Strat_ICT_Wyckoff_SpringUTAD.mqh


Upgrade plan:


consume phase state from ICTWyckoffModel.mqh / WyckoffCycle.mqh

detect Spring/UTAD as a staged event, not a loose pattern label

require VSA effort/result and profile/auction rejection

prefer direct CVD/OFI/flow divergence where available

allow proxy auction bias + liquidity stress proxy when direct flow unavailable

emit Spring/UTAD hypothesis with phase-specific invalidate/target rules


Setup emphasis:
phase + trap event + participation + reclaim/failure.


StrategyBase.mqh, StrategyCommon.mqh, StrategyRegistry.mqh


Add a common contract:


all strategies implement BuildHypothesis(...)

all return StrategyHypothesis_t

all expose local score breakdown

common helper stages live in StrategyCommon.mqh

registry arbitrates hypotheses by admissibility first, score second


Add anti-duplicate logic:


same side

same symbol

same POI cluster

same session window
should not spawn multiple nearly identical trades.


Router.mqh


Router should pick among hypotheses, not indicators.
Selection priority:


admissible hypotheses only

highest quality after location/stack/degrade checks

execution posture compatible with current tape

strategy-specific veto masks respected


Router input should be:
FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t
not just market state.


Policies.mqh and RiskEngine.mqh


Update to consume:


SignalStackGate_t

LocationPass_t

InstCoverage_t

InstSelSource_t

degrade mode

strategy-specific RR model

strategy-specific stop model

news/session restrictions


Risk should be able to tighten size when:


Institutional proxy only

coverage partial

volatility extreme

liquidity stress elevated


Execution.mqh


No ownership change.
Consume posture only:


passive/aggressive/limit-on-retest/market-on-confirm

stop placement model

partials

slippage cap

cancel conditions


PositionMgmt.mqh


Operate on FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t and StrategyHypothesis_t, not raw candidate signals.
Use strategy metadata for:


BE rules

partial take profit

invalidate-on-structure-break

session exit rules


State.mqh


Persist:


freshness

selected category signals

coverage/degrade state

hypothesis bank

last router pick

anti-duplicate stamps

warmup readiness


6. New supporting object to add


Add StrategyHypothesisBank.mqh or fold the bank into StrategyRegistry.mqh.


Responsibilities:


collect hypotheses from Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh and Strat_ICT*.mqh

normalize scoring fields

expose winning / rejected hypotheses

store reject reasons


This keeps strategies independent and router input clean.


7. Warmup, MLBlender, Tester alignment plan


Warmup.mqh


Upgrade to seed the exact same production pipeline:


preselect symbol universe

preseed scanner caches

warm indicator handles

warm session VWAP/TWAP/EMA/ATR/profile models

subscribe DOM where supported from centralized ownership

establish state freshness before enabling strategy arming


Because MarketBookAdd() subscriptions and OnBookEvent() handling are chart-scoped/broadcast within the chart, warmup should prepare and validate those subscriptions from central EA ownership, not strategy code. (MQL5)


Warmup readiness should require:


base context ready

structure ready

category selector ready

Institutional coverage state known

degrade mode resolved

no strategy can arm before readiness is true


MLBlender.mqh


Do not let ML learn from raw chaotic indicator soup.
Make it consume:


canonical category-selected state

pass vectors

coverage/degrade state

structure vector

emitted strategy hypotheses

realized outcomes


Better feature target:


predict hypothesis quality uplift

rank hypotheses

calibrate local alpha

adjust confidence under degrade modes


Do not use MLBlender as a parallel signal engine that bypasses the canonical selector.


Tester.mqh


Tester must use the same pipeline.
Required scenarios:


full institutional availability

partial institutional availability

proxy institutional substitution

soft-neutral stack relax

hard-block

high spread shock

low resiliency

session-specific windows

news-restricted windows


Because FX and OTC gold do not provide centralized observability the way exchange-traded books do, tester results are meaningless unless degrade scenarios are explicitly exercised. (Bank for International Settlements)


Tester logging should include:


selected category signal per category

stack score

location score

institutional coverage

institutional source direct/proxy/none

degrade mode used

hypothesis winner

router winner

final veto reason


8. Concrete rewrite plan for Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Implement this staged buy/sell logic shape.


Buy hypothesis path


Direction seed:
buy_bias = input_buy OR htf_accumulation OR selected_inst_bullish OR selected_volume_bullish

Regime:
require bullish accumulation / bullish continuation / reclaim regime

Location:
require entry timeframe demand/support/OB/FVG cluster near H4 pivot/support/D1 structure

Liquidity event:
require sell-side liquidity sweep, inducement clear, or reclaim event

Institutional:
require direct bullish institutional selected signal or approved proxy bullish institutional selected signal

Volume:
require bullish selected volume signal and/or VSA participation at POI

Trigger:
require one of:


bullish candlestick pattern

bullish chart pattern

price above session VWAP and HTF EMA21 > EMA50

Execution:
require acceptable spread/slippage/resiliency/depth and RR

Emit hypothesis:
BUY hypothesis anchored to POI and OB zone


Sell hypothesis path


Mirror the above:


distribution / bearish continuation / rejection regime

supply/resistance/OB/FVG near H4 pivot/resistance/D1 structure

buy-side sweep or failure event

bearish institutional support

bearish VSA/volume participation

bearish trigger

execution gate

emit SELL hypothesis


That preserves your original idea, but makes it architecture-correct.


9. Rollout sequence


Use this sequence. It is the safest.


Stabilize transports in Types.mqh

Finalize InstitutionalStateVector.mqh

Finalize CategorySelector.mqh

Add StrategyHypothesis_t and hypothesis bank

Refactor Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh

Refactor each ICT strategy to same contract

Update StrategyRegistry.mqh and router intake

Update Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh

Update PositionMgmt.mqh

Align Warmup.mqh

Align MLBlender.mqh

Align Tester.mqh

Add telemetry and gate-trace logs

Run degrade-mode backtests


10. Acceptance criteria


This refactor is complete only when:


strategies no longer compute canonical OFI/OBI/CVD/DOM themselves

one active signal per category is selected centrally

SignalStackGate_t and LocationPass_t are hard preconditions

strategies emit hypotheses, not trade orders

router chooses among hypotheses, not raw indicator combinations

Institutional direct/proxy/none state is explicit and logged

warmup, tester, and ML use the same state pipeline

STRAT_MAIN_ONLY truly means only Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh plus ICT strategy files can originate trade hypotheses


Bottom line


The upgrade is not “make Main logic smarter.”
It is:


move canonical truth upstream

turn Main and ICT logic into staged hypothesis builders

route hypotheses through one shared decision chain

make OTC/FX/XAUUSD blindness explicit with degrade logic instead of pretending the missing book exists


That is the correct institutional refactor.


Yes. The clean improvement is:


canonical market state first -> category-selected state -> staged strategy gate -> strategy hypotheses -> final strategy-conditioned trade state


Not the other way around.


Your old Main Trading Logic reads like a human checklist. That is useful as trading intent, but not as system architecture. Right now it mixes bias, location, confirmation, execution, and entry trigger into one block. The fix is to split it into staged gates and make Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh consume the canonical state produced upstream, not rebuild it locally. That is especially important in MT5 because timer ownership is per program and BookEvent subscriptions are chart-broadcast, so central ownership of scan cadence and DOM subscriptions is the sane design. (MQL5)


For FX and XAUUSD, this is even more important because the market is OTC, fragmented, and heavily internalised, so the Institutional layer must already handle observability, freshness, and degrade rules before any strategy interprets it. BIS describes FX as decentralised and fragmented, with more than 80% of customer trades matched internally by dealers, and LBMA describes London gold as a wholesale OTC market where trade reporting improves transparency rather than providing a single public real-time consolidated book. FINRA’s ATS/OTC transparency is delayed. (Bank for International Settlements)


The core microstructure reason to keep canonical signal ownership outside strategies is also strong: Cont, Kukanov, and Stoikov show short-horizon price changes are mainly driven by order flow imbalance, with impact linked to depth. You do not want five strategy files computing slightly different OFI worlds. (OUP Academic)


Here is the improvement plan I would use.


1. Target architecture to enforce


Lock this as the backend ownership chain:


CA_Trading_System_EA.mq5
-> Signals/Snapshots/Scanners
-> MarketScannerHub.mqh
-> AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh
-> InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
-> CategorySelector.mqh
-> Strategy layer:
Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh
Strat_ICT_OBFVG_OTE.mqh
Strat_ICT_PO3.mqh
Strat_ICT_SilverBullet.mqh
Strat_ICT_Wyckoff_SpringUTAD.mqh
-> StrategyHypothesis/StrategyContext
-> StrategyRegistry.mqh / StrategyBase.mqh / StrategyCommon.mqh
-> Router.mqh
-> Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh
-> Execution.mqh
-> PositionMgmt.mqh / State.mqh / Config.mqh


The rule is simple:
Confluence/InstitutionalStateVector/CategorySelector own market truth.
Strategies own interpretation.
Router owns pick.
Policies/Risk own veto.
Execution owns sending.


2. What to change in Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Your current buy/sell checklist should not stay as one long if-else trade trigger. It should become a staged strategy gate that maps your existing checklist into explicit phases.


New staged gate for Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Stage 1: Bias seed
Inputs:


Buy/Sell manual selector

1H/4H Wyckoff or accumulation/distribution phase

selected Trend category signal

selected Momentum category signal

selected Institutional category signal
Output:

intended direction dir_t

bias source mask

bias confidence


Important change:
Manual Buy/Sell input becomes a prior, not an auto-trigger by itself.


Stage 2: Regime gate
Use:


ICTWyckoffModel.mqh

WyckoffCycle.mqh

RegimeCorr.mqh

ADX / volatility regime

session context
Goal:
Decide whether this is a continuation, reversal, manipulation-reversal, or mean-reversion candidate.


Stage 3: HTF location gate
This is where your old checklist items 1 and part of 2 belong.
Use:


Daily and 4H structure

4H and Daily pivots

support/resistance clusters

trendlines

fib levels

HTF OB / SD / FVG context
Output:

HTF structure alignment

valid POI corridor

location anchor type:
pivot / support / resistance / demand / supply / OB / FVG / fib / trendline


No strategy should proceed without location pass.


Stage 4: POI gate on entry timeframe
This is your old checklist items 2 and 5.
Use:


StructureSDOB.mqh

FVG.mqh

Fibonacci.mqh

PivotsLevels.mqh

Trendlines.mqh

VolumeProfile.mqh
Goal:
Find entry timeframe demand/supply or OB near the HTF anchor.
Output:

poi_lo

poi_hi

poi_type

poi_alignment_score


Stage 5: Liquidity event gate
This is your old checklist item 4.
Use:


LiquidityCues.mqh

sweep/grab/inducement detection

SweepScore_t

FVG reclaim / displacement / rejection
Goal:
Require an actual liquidity event, not just passive proximity.
Examples:

sweep of sell-side liquidity into demand

buy-side sweep into supply

inducement then reclaim

spring / UTAD style false break
Output:

liquidity_event_type

liquidity_event_strength

displacement_present flag


Stage 6: Institutional microstructure gate
This is your old checklist item 3, but upgraded properly.
Use:


InstitutionalStateVector.mqh

CategorySelector.mqh

direct Institutional selected signal if available

degrade-aware proxy if not

raw fallback read-only diagnostics:
OFI_t
OBI_t
CVD_t
FlowImb_t
VPIN_t
Resil_t
SpreadShock_t
DepthFade_t
Goal:
Require buy-side or sell-side participation consistent with direction.
For buy:

increasing buy-side OFI or signed flow or positive delta

acceptable toxicity

acceptable resiliency
For sell:

mirror conditions
Output:

micro_pass

micro_dir

micro_confidence

degrade_acceptance_t


This is where InstitutionalStateVector.mqh and CategorySelector.mqh are actually utilized by strategy instead of being bypassed.


Stage 7: Volume confirmation gate
This is your old checklist item 6.
Use:


VSA.mqh

FootprintProxy.mqh

VolumeProfile.mqh

Volume category selected signal
Goal:
Confirm that the POI is getting real participation.
For buy:

above-average bullish VSA at demand/OB/support/pivot

positive footprint delta or stacked buy imbalance if available
For sell:

mirror conditions
Output:

volume_pass

volume_score


Stage 8: Pattern gate
This is your old checklist items 7 and 8.
Use:


Patterns.mqh

chart patterns

candlestick patterns
Goal:
Treat patterns as confirmers, not primary owners of trade truth.
Important change:
Pattern confirmation should be optional but rewarded, not mandatory in all cases.
Accepted alternatives:

bullish/bearish candlestick pattern

bullish/bearish chart pattern

or price relative to session VWAP plus HTF EMA alignment


Stage 9: Execution gate
This was too implicit in the old logic.
Use:


VWAP.mqh

spread/slippage/depth checks

session filter

execution posture
Goal:
Before arming, ensure execution is sane.
Examples:

price near OB/zone/pivot as intended

spread not blown out

slippage risk acceptable

killzone/session appropriate

not vetoed by NewsFilter


Stage 10: Strategy hypothesis emission
If stages 1 to 9 pass:
emit StrategyHypothesis_t instead of directly sending a trade.
Fields should include:


strategy_id

armed_t

dir_t

setup_type

setup_class

poi_type

poi_lo

poi_hi

location_pass_t

stack_required_votes_t

stack_actual_votes_t

liquidity_event_type

exec_style_t

stop_model_t

tp_model_t

rr_min_t

alpha_local_t

risk_local_t

confidence_local_t

invalidation_reason

degrade_acceptance_t


That is the bridge between MainTradingLogic and Router.


3. How your old Buy logic should be rewritten conceptually


Old version:
if buy selector or accumulation or buy order flow or buy volume, then run checklist and enter if one pattern or VWAP/EMA.


New version:
Build a buy hypothesis only if all of these are true in sequence:


buy bias seed exists

regime supports bullish setup

HTF location valid near daily/4H structure and pivot/support

entry timeframe POI valid near demand/OB/FVG/support anchor

liquidity event occurred

Institutional microstructure confirms or acceptable degrade proxy confirms

volume confirms at POI

one of:
pattern confirmation
chart pattern confirmation
VWAP + HTF EMA trend confirmation

execution conditions acceptable


Then:
emit BUY StrategyHypothesis_t


Sell side is the exact mirror.


So the old logic survives, but it is distributed into explicit gates instead of living as one giant boolean blob.


4. Scoring model for Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh


Do not use one flat score. Use grouped scoring.


Location score:


HTF structure alignment

pivot/SR/fib proximity

demand/supply/OB/FVG overlap

POI quality


Liquidity score:


sweep/grab quality

displacement

reclaim

inducement quality


Microstructure score:


selected Institutional category state

OFI / OBI / CVD / FlowImb consistency

toxicity penalty

resiliency bonus

degrade penalty if proxy used


Volume score:


VSA confirmation

footprint delta / imbalance

profile acceptance/rejection


Pattern score:


chart pattern

candle pattern

VWAP + EMA alternative trend confirmation


Execution score:


spread

slippage

session fit

news veto state


Then define:
MainLogicQuality_t = wLoc * LocationScore + wLiq * LiquidityScore + wMicro * MicroScore + wVol * VolumeScore + wPat * PatternScore + wExec * ExecutionScore


Only emit hypothesis if:


LocationPass_t = 1

SignalStackGate_t = 1

MainLogicQuality_t >= thMainQuality

mandatory microstructure or degrade rule satisfied

execution/risk not already broken


5. Improvements for each ICT strategy


Strat_ICT_OBFVG_OTE.mqh


Current idea:
OB + FVG + OTE entry.


Upgrade it to:


HTF regime gate first

require HTF OB or SD alignment

require entry timeframe FVG touching or overlapping OTE corridor

require liquidity sweep or displacement-reclaim around POI

require Institutional confirmation at the POI:
direct OFI/OBI/CVD if available
proxy degrade only if configured

require VSA/footprint improvement into the entry zone

execution gate:
spread, resiliency, session, slippage
Output:
OBFVGOTE StrategyHypothesis_t


Best use:
continuation or manipulation-reversal entries.


Strat_ICT_PO3.mqh


Current idea:
accumulation -> manipulation -> distribution.


Upgrade it to:


explicitly consume Wyckoff/PO3 state from ICTWyckoffModel.mqh

map accumulation/manipulation/distribution into a staged PO3 hypothesis

require the manipulation leg to coincide with a liquidity event

require selected category state to confirm distribution leg direction

use VWAP and profile acceptance to detect reclaim after manipulation

require Institutional confirmation during the expansion leg
Output:
PO3 StrategyHypothesis_t with manipulation_leg_detected and expansion_ready flags


Best use:
London/NY session manipulation structures.


Strat_ICT_SilverBullet.mqh


Current idea:
time-window ICT entry.


Upgrade it to:


make time window only a regime/session gate, not the strategy itself

require valid location inside killzone:
FVG, OB, pivot, SR, SD, fib, sweep reclaim

require one selected signal from each category to support direction

require microstructure/volume pass if direct signals are present

execution gate very strict because Silver Bullet is timing-sensitive
Output:
SilverBullet StrategyHypothesis_t with session_urgency and precision_entry profile


Best use:
low-latency POI execution during killzones.


Strat_ICT_Wyckoff_SpringUTAD.mqh


Current idea:
spring / UTAD.


Upgrade it to:


use Wyckoff phase state as primary regime gate

require sweep of range edge

require VSA stopping volume / no supply / no demand style confirmation

require profile rejection and/or footprint absorption if available

require Institutional confirmation:
direct or degrade proxy

require reclaim back into range / above below key level
Output:
SpringUTAD StrategyHypothesis_t with spring_or_utad subtype


Best use:
reversal setups at accumulation/distribution boundaries.

You need a dedicated transport contract between strategies and router.


Recommended file:
StrategyHypothesisBank.mqh or StrategyContext.mqh

StrategyHypothesis_t
with fields:

poi_hi

tp_model_t

rr_min_t

alpha_local_t

risk_local_t

confidence_local_t

veto_reason

notes/debug mask


Then StrategyRegistry chooses among hypotheses, not among raw signals.


7. File-by-file plan


MarketScannerHub.mqh


Keep as scan cadence owner.

do not let strategies call scanners directly

CategorySelector.mqh

Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh

No raw signal assembly inside this file.


Strat_ICT*.mqh

No local duplicate OFI/OBI/CVD math.


StrategyRegistry.mqh / StrategyBase.mqh / StrategyCommon.mqh

best location
best RR
best execution posture

Router.mqh

degrade too severe

portfolio exposure

Execution.mqh

No fusion logic.

urgency

stop/tp

sizing

order type


PositionMgmt.mqh

Examples:

strategy-conditioned execution posture

9. Warmup.mqh, MLBlender.mqh, Tester.mqh alignment plan


Warmup.mqh


Update it so warmup primes the exact same pipeline used live:


symbol pool preload

strategy hypothesis pipeline

DOM subscriptions where supported

session VWAP and HTF caches

It should consume:

StructureVector_t

StrategyHypothesis_t

final router outcomes

calibrate weights

learn degrade penalties

learn which strategy wins in which regime


Target labels:


hypothesis accepted/rejected

routed/not routed

OnTimer scan cadence simulation

same Institutional availability and degrade modes

Without that, Strategy Tester results will lie to you in a suit and tie.


10. Recommended implementation order


Freeze ownership boundaries

Finalize InstitutionalStateVector.mqh outputs

Finalize CategorySelector.mqh outputs

Add StrategyHypothesis_t transport contract

Refactor Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh into staged hypothesis builder

Refactor all ICT strategies into staged hypothesis builders

Update StrategyRegistry.mqh to arbitrate hypotheses

Update Router.mqh to consume final strategy-conditioned state

Update Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh vetoes

Update PositionMgmt.mqh to use strategy-conditioned lifecycle rules

Align Warmup.mqh, MLBlender.mqh, Tester.mqh

Add logging and tester telemetry for every stage


11. What should be mandatory versus optional in the new Main Trading Logic


Mandatory:


canonical state fresh enough

category stack pass

location pass

POI found

execution sane

strategy emits hypothesis

router/risk approve


Usually mandatory:


liquidity event

microstructure confirmation or accepted degrade rule

volume confirmation at POI


Optional but rewarded:


candlestick pattern

chart pattern

VWAP + HTF EMA alternative confirmation


That keeps the system institutional instead of pattern-chasing with extra candles sprinkled on top like parsley.


12. Best concise design rule


Do not turn signals into trades directly.
Turn canonical state into strategy hypotheses.
Then turn the winning strategy hypothesis into the final integrated trade state.


That is the improvement path I would use for your EA.

Creating implementation change plan for files


The user asked for a detailed, comprehensive per-file implementation changes plan. No need to search since the user's content already contains the necessary information. I’ll focus on summarizing the changes by file: roles, objectives, changes, interfaces, inputs/outputs, and migration notes. I'll avoid specifics like line numbers. No additional tools needed.


Thought for 14s

Absolutely. Here is the single merged, detailed, comprehensive PER-FILE implementation changes plan for the refactor.


This is the architecture-correct version of your improvement path:


canonical market state first → category-selected state → staged strategy gate → strategy hypotheses → final strategy-conditioned trade state


Not the other way around. 👍



1. Refactor objective


The refactor must enforce one clean ownership chain:


CA_Trading_System_EA.mq5
→ Signals / Snapshots / Scanners
→ MarketScannerHub.mqh
→ AutochartistEngine.mqh + Confluence.mqh
→ InstitutionalStateVector.mqh
→ CategorySelector.mqh
→ Strategy layer
(Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh, Strat_ICT_*.mqh)
→ StrategyHypothesis_t / StrategyContext_t
→ StrategyRegistry.mqh / StrategyBase.mqh / StrategyCommon.mqh
→ Router.mqh
→ Policies.mqh / RiskEngine.mqh
→ Execution.mqh
→ PositionMgmt.mqh / State.mqh / Config.mqh


Core rule


Upstream owns truth

Strategies own interpretation

Router owns selection

Policies/Risk own veto + resize

Execution owns sending only


That split needs to be hard. No “just this one strategy can recompute OBI locally” nonsense. That is how codebases become haunted. 😄



2. End-state data flow to implement


The internal flow should be standardized to this:


Phase A: Canonical market assembly


Raw market state
→ RawSignalBank_t
→ Coverage / degrade state
→ BaseContextVector_t
→ StructureVector_t
→ CoverageContextVector_t
→ AuxContextVector_t


Phase B: Anti-echo category selection


Canonical raw bank
→ CategorySelectedVector_t
→ CategoryPassVector_t
→ SignalStackGate_t
→ LocationPass_t


Phase C: Strategy interpretation


Strategies consume the canonical vectors and emit:


StrategyHypothesis_t

StrategyContext_t

local alpha/risk/entry/posture fields

veto masks

POI / stop / TP models


Phase D: Final trade integration


Winning strategy hypothesis


selected category state

coverage/degrade context

execution posture
= FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t


Phase E: Final decision chain


FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t
→ Router.mqh
→ Policies.mqh
→ RiskEngine.mqh
→ Execution.mqh
→ PositionMgmt.mqh

depth fade

resiliency

session window

RR feasibility

exec_style

stop_model

tp_model

rr_min

exec_pass

location score

liquidity score

microstructure score

volume score

pattern score

execution score


Then compute final local quality from weights in Config.mqh.

execution sane

B. Tighten size under weak observability


Reduce risk when:


proxy only

partial coverage

extreme volatility

elevated liquidity stress

weak resiliency


C. Keep sizing downstream of selection


Risk sizes the chosen hypothesis, not raw market states.



Execution.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Order sending and execution management only.


Required changes


A. No ownership change


Leave as sender only.


B. Consume posture only


Use:


passive/aggressive/limit-on-retest/market-on-confirm

stop placement model

TP model

slippage cap

cancel conditions

partial management flags


C. No fusion logic


Do not calculate confluence, market truth, or strategy gating here.



PositionMgmt.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Post-entry lifecycle manager using strategy-conditioned metadata.


Required changes


A. Change operating basis


Operate on:


FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t

StrategyHypothesis_t


not raw candidate signals.


B. Use strategy metadata


Support:


BE rules

partial take profit rules

invalidate-on-structure-break

session exit rules

strategy-specific trailing logic


C. No raw signal lifecycle logic


Position management should not be inferring setup logic from scratch after entry.



State.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Persistent runtime state owner.


Required changes


A. Persist freshness and readiness


Store:


freshness state

warmup readiness

coverage/degrade state

selected category signals

last hypothesis bank

last router pick

anti-duplicate stamps


B. Persist strategy-conditioned runtime state


Need to retain:


currently active strategy hypothesis metadata

last selected POI

posture

invalidate markers

execution gating traces



Warmup.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Prime the exact same production pipeline before live arming.


Required changes


A. Warm the real production path


Warm:


symbol universe

scanner caches

indicator handles

session VWAP/TWAP/EMA/ATR/profile models

institutional availability state

category selector state

strategy pipeline prerequisites


B. Preseed DOM centrally


Where supported, validate centralized DOM readiness here.


C. Readiness gating


No strategy can arm until:


base context ready

structure ready

category selector ready

institutional coverage known

degrade mode resolved


This prevents the first live timer tick from doing the whole universe catch-up circus.



MLBlender.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Model consumer of canonical selected state and emitted hypotheses.


Required changes


A. Do not create a parallel state universe


It should consume:


canonical category-selected state

pass vectors

structure vector

coverage/degrade state

emitted strategy hypotheses

realized outcomes


B. Best use


Use ML to:


predict hypothesis quality uplift

rank hypotheses

calibrate local alpha

learn degrade penalties


C. Do not bypass selector/strategies/router


ML should refine, not become another rogue signal cult.



Tester.mqh


Primary role after refactor


Simulation path aligned to live production architecture.


Required changes


A. Use same pipeline


Tester must simulate:


OnTimer scan cadence

same institutional availability rules

same degrade modes

same category selector

same staged strategy gates

same hypothesis bank

same router/risk path


B. Required scenarios


Test:


full institutional availability

partial availability

proxy substitution

soft-neutral relax

hard-block

spread shock

low resiliency

news-restricted windows

session-specific windows


C. Tester logs must include


selected category signals

category passes

location pass

stack score

institutional coverage

institutional source direct/proxy/none

degrade mode used

winning hypothesis

router winner

final veto reason


Without this, tester output will look confident while quietly lying through its teeth.



4. Supporting provider alignment files


These are not the primary ownership files, but they must align with the new pipeline.



ICTWyckoffModel.mqh


Use as:


phase/regime provider

HTF accumulation/distribution context provider


Do not let it become a router or order owner.



WyckoffCycle.mqh


Use as:


phase/state provider

cycle interpretation input for strategies


Do not duplicate strategy gating here.



ICTSessionModel.mqh


Use as:


session segmentation provider

killzone/session window provider

session narrative input for PO3/SilverBullet


Do not place trades from here.



LiquidityCues.mqh


Use as:


liquidity sweep / inducement / reclaim / stress provider


It should enrich strategy gates, not own canonical institutional state.



Patterns.mqh


Use as:


candlestick and chart pattern confirmer


Patterns must be treated as confirmation enhancers, not primary architecture owners.



5. New final integrated object to introduce


FinalStrategyIntegratedStateVector_t


This should be the final downstream transport consumed by Router, Policies, Risk, Execution, and PositionMgmt.


It should combine:


BaseContextVector_t

CategorySelectedVector_t

CategoryPassVector_t

StructureVector_t

CoverageContextVector_t

AuxContextVector_t

chosen StrategyHypothesis_t

strategy-conditioned execution posture

strategy-conditioned risk template


This is the proper “final trade state”.



6. Mandatory strategy-layer contract


Every strategy should follow the same contract:


Input


canonical state vectors

selected category vectors

coverage/degrade state

read-only diagnostics

strategy config


Output


StrategyHypothesis_t


Mandatory shared behaviour


no direct order placement

no canonical signal reconstruction

no scanner ownership

no DOM ownership

no duplicate OBI/CVD/OFI math



7. Mandatory vs optional gates in the new Main / ICT flow


Mandatory


canonical state fresh enough

category stack pass

location pass

POI found

execution sane

hypothesis emission

router/risk approval


Usually mandatory


liquidity event

institutional confirmation or allowed degrade rule

volume confirmation at POI


Optional but rewarded


candlestick pattern

chart pattern

VWAP + HTF EMA alternative confirmation


That keeps the engine institutional instead of becoming a candle-sticker collection with delusions of grandeur.



8. Rollout order


This is the cleanest and safest sequence.


Phase 1 — transport + ownership


Types.mqh

Config.mqh

State.mqh


Phase 2 — canonical market truth


MarketScannerHub.mqh

AutochartistEngine.mqh

Confluence.mqh

InstitutionalStateVector.mqh

CategorySelector.mqh


Phase 3 — strategy contract


StrategyBase.mqh

StrategyCommon.mqh

StrategyRegistry.mqh

StrategyHypothesisBank.mqh (or fold into registry)


Phase 4 — strategy refactor


Strat_MainTradingLogic.mqh

Strat_ICT_OBFVG_OTE.mqh

Strat_ICT_PO3.mqh

Strat_ICT_SilverBullet.mqh

Strat_ICT_Wyckoff_SpringUTAD.mqh


Phase 5 — downstream decision chain


Router.mqh

Policies.mqh

RiskEngine.mqh

Execution.mqh

PositionMgmt.mqh


Phase 6 — operational alignment


Warmup.mqh

MLBlender.mqh

Tester.mqh

CA_Trading_System_EA.mq5



9. Acceptance criteria


This refactor is only complete when all of these are true:


strategies no longer compute canonical OFI/OBI/CVD/DOM themselves

one active signal per category is selected centrally

SignalStackGate_t and LocationPass_t are hard preconditions

strategies emit hypotheses, not trade orders

router chooses among hypotheses, not raw indicator mixes

direct/proxy/none institutional state is explicit and logged

warmup, tester, and ML all use the same state pipeline

STRAT_MAIN_ONLY truly restricts trade-origination to Main + ICT strategy files only



10. Bottom line


The merged implementation direction is:


move canonical truth upstream

centralize scan cadence and observability

make Institutional state degrade-aware

let CategorySelector own anti-echo selection

turn Main and ICT strategies into staged hypothesis builders

route the winning hypothesis through one shared downstream chain

keep Execution dumb in the good way: send only


That is the clean institutional refactor.


If you want, the next clean follow-up is for me to turn this into a strict patch order checklist per file with substeps and dependency notes, so you can implement it module-by-module without cross-wiring yourself into compile-error purgatory.
